51.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Prophet ﷺ said: A group of Muslims will conquer the treasures of Khosrow — the one in the White Palace — Jabir said: And I was among them and I received a thousand dirhams.'
51.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ bersabda: Sekelompok kaum Muslimin akan menaklukkan harta kekayaan Kisra — yang ada di istana putih — Jabir berkata: Aku termasuk di antara mereka dan mendapatkan seribu dirham.'

52.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The muadhdhin of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would give the adhan and then wait. When he saw the Prophet ﷺ had come out, he would call the iqamah.'
52.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Muadzin Rasulullah ﷺ mengumandangkan adzan kemudian menunggu. Ketika ia melihat Nabi ﷺ telah keluar, ia mengumandangkan iqamah.'

53.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The seal of the Prophet ﷺ was like a pigeon's egg and its color was like the color of his body. And his hair had gone grey.'
53.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Stempel kenabian Nabi ﷺ seperti telur merpati dan warnanya seperti warna tubuh beliau. Dan rambutnya telah memutih.'

54.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that during the prayer, the Prophet ﷺ reached toward something in front of him. When he finished, the people asked him about it. He said: 'That was Shaytan — he was throwing sparks of fire at me to distract me from my prayer. I grabbed him and if I had caught him, I would have tied him to a pillar of the mosque.'
54.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dalam shalat, Nabi ﷺ meraih sesuatu di depan beliau. Ketika selesai, orang-orang bertanya. Beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah setan — ia melemparkan percikan api kepadaku untuk mengganggu shalatku. Aku meraihnya, dan seandainya aku berhasil menangkapnya, niscaya aku akan mengikatnya pada tiang masjid.'

55.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The muadhdhin of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would give the adhan and then wait and not call the iqamah until he saw the Prophet ﷺ had come out, then he would call the iqamah when he saw him.'
55.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Muadzin Rasulullah ﷺ mengumandangkan adzan kemudian menunggu dan tidak mengumandangkan iqamah hingga ia melihat Nabi ﷺ telah keluar, lalu ia mengumandangkan iqamah ketika melihatnya.'

56.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray the prayers in a manner similar to your prayers today, but he would delay Isha somewhat beyond the time you pray it, and he would make the prayer short.'
56.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat dengan cara mirip shalatmu hari ini, tetapi beliau mengakhirkan shalat Isya agak melampaui waktumu, dan beliau meringkas shalat.'

57.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite in Fajr prayer Surah Qaf and the Glorious Quran, and his prayer after that was shortened. And the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when he prayed Fajr, would sit in his place of prayer until the sun had risen.'
57.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca dalam shalat Subuh Surah Qaf wal-Quran al-Majid, dan shalat beliau setelah itu dipersingkat. Dan Rasulullah ﷺ, ketika selesai shalat Subuh, duduk di tempat shalatnya hingga matahari terbit.'

58.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The legs of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ were slender, and he would not laugh except with a smile, and when you looked at him you would say he was wearing kohl, though he was not wearing kohl.'
58.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kaki Rasulullah ﷺ ramping, beliau tidak tertawa kecuali dengan senyuman, dan ketika kamu memandang beliau kamu akan mengira beliau memakai celak padahal beliau tidak memakainya.'

59.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: In Makkah there is a stone that used to greet me in the nights before my prophethood. I recognize it when I pass by it.'
59.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Di Makkah ada sebuah batu yang biasa mengucapkan salam kepadaku pada malam-malam sebelum kenabianku. Aku mengenalinya ketika aku melewatinya.'

60.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ gestured toward something in front of him during prayer. When he turned, the people asked him. He said: 'That was Shaytan — he threw sparks of fire at my feet to distract me from my prayer. I fended him off. Had I caught him, he would have been tied to a pillar of the mosque so that the children of Madinah could go around him.'
60.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengisyaratkan ke sesuatu di depannya saat shalat. Ketika selesai, orang-orang bertanya. Beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah setan — ia melemparkan percikan api di kakiku untuk menggodaku dari shalat. Aku mendorongnya. Seandainya aku menangkapnya, ia akan diikatkan pada tiang masjid sehingga anak-anak Madinah bisa mengelilinginya.'

61.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The muadhdhin of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would give the adhan and then wait and not call the iqamah until he saw the Prophet ﷺ had come out. He would then call the iqamah when he saw him.'
61.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Muadzin Rasulullah ﷺ mengumandangkan adzan kemudian menunggu dan tidak mengumandangkan iqamah hingga ia melihat Nabi ﷺ telah keluar. Ia kemudian mengumandangkan iqamah ketika melihatnya.'

62.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to command us to fast Ashura, urge us to do so, and check on us about it. When Ramadan was made obligatory, he did not command us to do it, did not forbid us from it, and did not check on us about it.'
62.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memerintahkan kami untuk berpuasa Asyura, mendorong kami untuk melakukannya, dan memeriksa kami tentang hal itu. Ketika Ramadan diwajibkan, beliau tidak memerintahkan kami, tidak melarang kami, dan tidak memeriksa kami tentangnya.'

63.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded us to perform ablution from camel meat and not to perform ablution from mutton, to pray in sheepfolds, and not to pray in camel pens.'
63.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan kami untuk berwudhu setelah makan daging unta dan tidak berwudhu setelah makan daging kambing, shalat di kandang kambing, dan tidak shalat di kandang unta.'

64.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Companions would recall the pre-Islamic days and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would be silent. Sometimes he would smile.
64.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa para Sahabat biasa menyebutkan hari-hari jahiliyah dan Rasulullah ﷺ diam. Kadang-kadang beliau tersenyum.

65.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: This affair will continue to stand — the Muslims will fight for it until the Hour comes.'
65.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Urusan ini akan terus tegak — kaum Muslimin akan berperang untuknya hingga Hari Kiamat tiba.'

66.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: When Caesar is gone, there will be no Caesar after him, and when Khosrow is gone, there will be no Khosrow after him. By the One in whose hand is the soul of Muhammad, you will spend their treasures in the way of Allah, Blessed and Exalted.'
66.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Ketika Kaisar pergi, tidak akan ada Kaisar setelahnya, dan ketika Kisra pergi, tidak akan ada Kisra setelahnya. Demi Zat yang jiwa Muhammad ada di tangan-Nya, sungguh kalian akan menginfakkan harta kekayaan mereka di jalan Allah.'

67.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Prophet ﷺ say: There will be twelve khaliphs for this nation.'
67.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: Akan ada dua belas khalifah bagi umat ini.'

68.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was informed that the Prophet ﷺ said: This religion will never cease to stand — a group of Muslims will fight for it until the Hour comes.'
68.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku diberitahu bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: Agama ini tidak akan pernah berhenti tegak — sekelompok kaum Muslimin akan berperang untuknya hingga Hari Kiamat.'

69.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked the Prophet ﷺ: 'Should I perform ablution from mutton?' He said: 'If you wish, perform it; if you wish, do not.' He asked: 'Should I perform ablution from camel meat?' He said: 'Yes, perform ablution from camel meat.' He asked: 'Can I pray in camel pens?' He said: 'No.' He asked: 'Can I pray in sheepfolds?' He said: 'Yes, pray in sheepfolds.'
69.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Apakah aku harus berwudhu setelah daging kambing?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jika mau, berwudhulah; jika tidak, tidak apa-apa.' Ia bertanya: 'Apakah aku harus berwudhu setelah daging unta?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, berwudhulah.' Ia bertanya: 'Bolehkah aku shalat di kandang unta?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak.' Ia bertanya: 'Bolehkah aku shalat di kandang kambing?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, shalatlah di sana.'

70.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray Zuhr when the sun had passed its zenith.'
70.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat Zhuhur ketika matahari telah tergelincir.'

71.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Bilal would give the adhan when the sun had passed its zenith.'
71.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Bilal biasa mengumandangkan adzan ketika matahari telah tergelincir.'

72.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite in Zuhr and Asr: By the sky and the night visitor, and By the sky containing great stars, and similar surahs.
72.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca dalam Zhuhur dan Ashar: was-samaai wat-thariq, dan was-samaai dzaatil-buruj, dan surah-surah yang semisalnya.

73.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that Bilal used to give the adhan for Zuhr when the sun had passed its zenith.
73.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Bilal biasa mengumandangkan adzan Zhuhur ketika matahari telah tergelincir.

74.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Islam will remain strong until twelve khaliphs.' Then he said something quietly that I could not understand. I asked my father: 'What did he say?' He said: 'All of them will be from the Quraysh.'
74.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Islam akan tetap kuat hingga dua belas khalifah.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang pelan yang tidak aku pahami. Aku bertanya kepada ayahku: Apa yang beliau katakan? Ia berkata: Semuanya dari kaum Quraisy.'

75.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Prophet ﷺ say: Before the Hour, there will be liars.'
75.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: Menjelang Hari Kiamat akan ada para pendusta.'

76.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Indeed Allah, Blessed and Exalted, has named it Tabah' — meaning Madinah.
76.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah Tabaaraka wa Ta'ala menamakannya Tabah' — yaitu Madinah.

77.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ found the smell of garlic from a dish and did not eat it. He sent it to Abu Ayyub. Abu Ayyub saw no traces of the Prophet's fingers in it. He came to him and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I did not see the traces of your fingers in it.' He said: 'I found in it the smell of garlic.' He said: 'Then you send me what you do not eat yourself?' He said: 'For a messenger comes to me.'
77.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mencium bau bawang putih dari sebuah hidangan dan tidak memakannya. Beliau mengirimkannya kepada Abu Ayyub. Abu Ayyub tidak melihat bekas jari Nabi di dalamnya. Ia datang kepada beliau dan berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, aku tidak melihat bekas jari-jarimu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku mencium bau bawang putih.' Ia berkata: 'Kamu mengirimkan kepadaku apa yang tidak kamu makan sendiri?' Beliau bersabda: 'Karena malaikat datang kepadaku.'

78.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Should you not line up as the angels line up before their Lord, Blessed and Exalted?' They said: 'O Messenger of Allah, how do the angels line up before their Lord?' He said: 'They complete the front rows and stand close together in the row.'
78.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidakkah kalian berbaris sebagaimana para malaikat berbaris di hadapan Rabb mereka?' Mereka bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, bagaimana para malaikat berbaris?' Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka menyempurnakan shaf-shaf pertama dan rapat dalam shaf.'

79.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The prayer of the Prophet ﷺ was moderate and his khutbah was moderate.'
79.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Shalat Nabi ﷺ ringkas dan khutbahnya pun ringkas.'

80.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The prayer of the Prophet ﷺ was moderate and his khutbah was moderate.'
80.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Shalat Nabi ﷺ ringkas dan khutbahnya pun ringkas.'

81.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Why do I see you raising your hands as if they are tails of wild horses? Be still during prayer.' And he entered the mosque and we were in scattered circles. He said: 'Why do I see you scattered about?'
81.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Mengapa aku melihat kalian mengangkat tangan seolah ekor kuda liar? Diamlah dalam shalat.' Dan beliau masuk masjid sementara kami duduk berkelompok-kelompok. Beliau bersabda: 'Mengapa aku melihat kalian berpencar-pencar?'

82.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the people would gesture to each other to the right and left during the taslim. When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ finished the prayer he said: 'What is the matter with one of you doing this — as if they are tails of wild horses? Is it not enough for one of you to say like this — and he placed his right hand on his thigh.'
82.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa orang-orang biasa mengisyaratkan ke kanan dan kiri saat salam. Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ selesai shalat, beliau bersabda: 'Mengapa salah seorang dari kalian melakukan ini — seolah ekor kuda liar? Tidakkah cukup bagi salah seorang dari kalian untuk mengucapkan seperti ini — dan beliau meletakkan tangan kanannya di atas pahanya.'

83.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'There was no adhan given for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for the two Eids, nor was the iqamah called.'
83.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Tidak ada adzan yang dikumandangkan untuk Rasulullah ﷺ pada dua shalat Eid, dan tidak pula iqamah.'

84.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man killed himself during the time of the Prophet ﷺ and the Prophet ﷺ did not perform the funeral prayer over him.
84.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria membunuh dirinya sendiri pada masa Nabi ﷺ dan Nabi ﷺ tidak menshalati jenazahnya.

85.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw it like a pigeon's egg, its color was the color of his body.'
85.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihatnya seperti telur merpati, warnanya seperti warna tubuh beliau.'

86.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to sit in his place of prayer after praying Fajr until the sun had risen beautifully.
86.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa duduk di tempat shalatnya setelah shalat Subuh hingga matahari terbit dengan indah.

87.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: This affair will proceed smoothly until twelve khaliphs come — all of them from the Quraysh.'
87.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Urusan ini akan berjalan lancar hingga dua belas khalifah datang — semuanya dari kaum Quraisy.'

88.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to make remembrance of Allah in his khutbah.
88.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa berzikir kepada Allah dalam khutbahnya.

89.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ would sit between the two khutbahs, recite verses from the Quran, and his prayer was moderate and his khutbah was moderate.
89.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa duduk di antara dua khutbah, membaca ayat-ayat Al-Quran, dan shalat beliau ringkas, khutbahnya pun ringkas.

90.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: Before the Hour, there will be liars.'
90.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Menjelang Hari Kiamat akan ada para pendusta.'

91.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when he prayed Fajr, used to sit in his place of prayer until the sun had risen beautifully or until it was high.'
91.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ, ketika selesai shalat Subuh, biasa duduk di tempat shalatnya hingga matahari terbit dengan indah atau hingga meninggi.'

92.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to deliver the khutbah standing, then sit, then stand and recite verses and make remembrance of Allah. His khutbah was moderate and his prayer was moderate.
92.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa berkhutbah sambil berdiri, kemudian duduk, kemudian berdiri membaca ayat-ayat dan berzikir kepada Allah. Khutbahnya ringkas dan shalatnya pun ringkas.

93.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'This affair will remain in good order until there are twelve amirs.' Then he said something I did not understand. I asked my father what he said. He said: 'All of them from the Quraysh.'
93.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Urusan ini akan tetap baik hingga ada dua belas amir.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku pahami. Aku bertanya kepada ayahku apa yang beliau katakan. Ia berkata: Semuanya dari kaum Quraisy.'

94.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'When we would come to the Prophet ﷺ, each of us would sit wherever he arrived.'
94.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika kami datang kepada Nabi ﷺ, masing-masing dari kami duduk di mana pun ia tiba.'

95.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ stoned Ma'iz ibn Malik and there is no mention of flogging.
95.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ merajam Ma'iz ibn Malik dan tidak disebutkan adanya hukuman cambuk.

96.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Let those people stop raising their eyes to the sky during prayer, or their eyes will not return to them.'
96.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Hendaklah orang-orang itu berhenti mengangkat pandangan mereka ke langit dalam shalat, atau mata mereka tidak akan kembali kepada mereka.'

97.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: I and the Hour have been sent like these two — and he pointed with his fingers.'
97.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Aku dan Hari Kiamat diutus seperti dua ini — dan beliau menunjuk dengan jari-jarinya.'

98.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked the Prophet ﷺ: 'Should I perform ablution from mutton?' He said: 'No.' He asked: 'Can I pray in sheepfolds?' He said: 'Yes, if you wish.' He asked: 'Should I perform ablution from camel meat?' He said: 'Yes.' He asked: 'Can I pray in camel pens?' He said: 'No.'
98.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Apakah aku perlu berwudhu setelah daging kambing?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak.' Ia bertanya: 'Bolehkah aku shalat di kandang kambing?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, jika mau.' Ia bertanya: 'Apakah aku perlu berwudhu setelah daging unta?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya.' Ia bertanya: 'Bolehkah aku shalat di kandang unta?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak.'

99.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was informed that the Prophet ﷺ said: This religion will never cease to stand — a group of Muslims will fight for it until the Hour comes.'
99.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku diberitahu bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: Agama ini tidak akan pernah berhenti tegak — sekelompok kaum Muslimin akan berperang untuknya hingga Hari Kiamat tiba.'

100.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ named Madinah Tabah.
100.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ menamai Madinah dengan Tabah.
